title: CryoNicks' Gear Redone
description: A little spin on Minecraft's tool textures
body:
A retexture of Minecraft's tools and weapons, done in my style!


![Tools and Sword textures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/838ff6935eab97c7c0fa8f1fec3516cf73c0016b.png)![Bow and Arrow Textures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6093fb42c1385c11b72e43c2daa6a611672648.png)


![That's me!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e80037475799541c1a0233867fa2a3995f1bcd8b.png)
